name: beyondtrust_privileged_remote_access
explanation: BeyondTrust Privileged Remote Access is a marketplace tile that ships only a logs configuration - a TCP syslog receiver with custom log_processing_rules where the user must supply <PORT> for the appliance to forward syslog to. The datadog_checks/beyondtrust_privileged_remote_access package contains no check.py and there is no metric collection or network probe. Enabling the integration requires user policy decisions (which port to listen on) plus configuration on the upstream PRA appliance to send syslog to that port; neither is discoverable from the wire on the Agent host.
notes: Pattern N (logs-only marketplace tile). Syslog-over-TCP receiver; <PORT> is user-chosen and the appliance must be configured to forward to it.
